Retractable Banner Stand FAQ

What is a retractable banner stand?

A retractable banner stand is a portable display where the banner rolls into the base for easy transport and storage, and it includes a carrying case.

What sizes are available for retractable banners?

Sizes range from tabletop mini banners (16" × 8") to large, wide format options (78" × 47"), with popular standard sizes like 78" × 24" and 78" × 33".

What materials are retractable banners printed on?

Retractable banners are available in 13 oz vinyl, 14 oz vinyl, and fabric materials, each designed for different display environments and durability requirements.

Can I customize my retractable banner design?

Yes—upload your own file, customize a template, or work with a designer to create your banner. We provide free digital proofs for approval before printing.

How are retractable banners printed?

Retractable banners are digitally printed in full CMYK color using UV fade-resistant inks for vibrant, long-lasting displays.

Can I order a replacement retractable banner without buying a new stand?

Yes—you can order a replacement banner without purchasing a new base kit, making it cost-effective to update your displays with new messaging or designs.

Banner Stand FAQ

What's included with a custom banner stand order?

Each banner stand includes premium aluminum hardware and one custom full-color graphic printed to exact specifications. Retractable stands include protective carrying cases, while other styles include appropriate assembly hardware and instructions.

What materials are banner stands and graphics made from?

Hardware is constructed from lightweight aluminum for durability and portability. Graphics are available in 13 oz. scrim vinyl, 14 oz. no-curl vinyl, or premium Banner Soft fabric depending on your display requirements and environment.

Are banner stand graphics printed in full color?

Yes, all graphics are digitally printed in full CMYK color using commercial-grade UV-resistant inks. Custom Pantone color matching is available for precise brand color reproduction across multiple displays.

Do you sell replacement graphics for banner stands?

Replacement graphics are available for all banner stand hardware allowing you to update messaging or replace damaged graphics while preserving your hardware investment. Hardware accessories and parts are also available for most stand types.

How do I store my banner stand graphics when not in use?

Roll graphics loosely with the printed side facing outward and store in a cool, dry location. Retractable banner graphics should remain attached to the mechanism and stored in the provided carrying case to prevent damage.

How do I clean and maintain banner stand graphics?

Clean graphics with mild soap and water using a soft cloth or sponge. Rinse thoroughly and allow to dry completely before storage. Avoid abrasive cleaners, rough materials, or excessive heat which can damage the printed surface.

What are custom banner stands commonly used for?

Popular applications include trade show displays, retail promotions, grand opening events, product launches, real estate marketing, educational presentations, healthcare facility displays, and directional signage due to their portability and professional appearance.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)?

An A-frame sign—also called a sidewalk sign or sandwich board—is a foldable, freestanding sign used to advertise in high foot-traffic areas like storefronts, strip malls, outdoor restaurants, and near parking lots.

Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use year-round?

Yes. These A-frames are made from durable plastic that won't rust or splinter, and the frame can be filled with sand or water for added outdoor stability in various weather conditions.

Does the Signicade A-frame include one or two printed inserts?

The complete kit includes two (2) full-color printed signs, sized 24" × 36" (one for each side of the A-frame).

What colors is the Signicade A-frame available in?

The Signicade Deluxe A-frame is available in white only. The printed signs can be customized with any colors and designs.

Do you offer other A-frame sizes or styles?

Yes. In addition to the Signicade Deluxe A-frame (24" × 36" sign size), other A-frame sizes and styles are available. Contact customer service for additional options and sizing information.

A-Frame Sign Questions & Answers

What is an A-frame sign and how is it used for business advertising?

An A-frame sign—also called a sidewalk sign or sandwich board—is a foldable, freestanding advertising display used in high foot-traffic areas like storefronts, strip malls, outdoor restaurants, and parking lots. The portable design allows businesses to attract customers with daily specials, promotions, and important announcements.

Are Signicade A-frames suitable for year-round outdoor use?

Yes, these A-frames are engineered for continuous outdoor use in all weather conditions. The frame is constructed from durable plastic that won't rust, splinter, or corrode, and can be filled with sand or water for enhanced stability during windy conditions. The printed signs feature weather-resistant inks and waterproof corrugated plastic material.

Does the complete A-frame kit include one or two printed signs?

Each Signicade Deluxe A-frame kit includes two (2) full-color printed signs sized 24" × 36"—one sign for each side of the frame. This allows for double-sided advertising with the option to display identical messaging or different content on each side.

What color options are available for the A-frame hardware?

Signicade Deluxe A-frames are available in black or white frame colors, allowing you to select the option that best complements your business branding and storefront appearance.

Do you offer different A-frame sizes beyond the Signicade Deluxe?

Yes, in addition to the Signicade Deluxe A-frame (24" × 36"), we also offer Simpo Sign A-frames (22" × 27") and Coroplast A-frame signs in multiple sizes including 12" × 18", 18" × 24", 22" × 28", and 24" × 36" to accommodate different advertising needs and space requirements.

Can I order replacement signs for my existing A-frame?

Absolutely. Replacement signs are available for existing A-frame hardware, allowing you to update messaging seasonally or replace weather-worn signs while extending the life of your original frame investment.

How stable are A-frame signs in windy outdoor conditions?

Signicade A-frames feature fillable bases that can hold water or sand for increased stability. When filled, the frame can weigh up to 35 pounds, providing excellent resistance to moderate winds. The low center of gravity design further reduces the risk of tipping in outdoor conditions.

What artwork specifications are required for A-frame sign printing?

A-frame signs require artwork sized at 24" x 36" with 150 DPI resolution minimum. Acceptable file formats include PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPEG/PNG files. Include 0.125" bleed and keep important elements 0.5" from edges for optimal results.

Frequently Asked Questions

What are polymetal signs used for?

Polymetal signs are ideal for professional business signage, including storefront identification, building directories, office signage, and commercial property displays. The weather-resistant construction makes them perfect for long-term outdoor installations.

What material are polymetal signs made from?

Our polymetal signs are constructed from 3mm aluminum composite material with a solid plastic core. This construction provides superior weather resistance and professional appearance while allowing for back-routing installation options.

What sizes are available for custom polymetal signs?

We offer standard sizes from 12" to 48" in various height and width combinations. Custom sizes are available through our custom quote service - contact customer service for pricing on non-standard dimensions.

Can polymetal signs be cut to custom shapes?

Yes, we offer contour cutting services to create custom shapes that match your logo or design specifications. This allows for unique signage that stands out while maintaining professional appearance and structural integrity.

Are polymetal signs available with double-sided printing?

Yes, we can print polymetal signs on both sides for applications like pole-mounted signs or projecting business signs where visibility from multiple directions is important.

Do polymetal signs print in full color?

Yes, we use full-color printing with UV-resistant inks to ensure vibrant graphics and long-lasting color performance in outdoor environments. Full bleed printing is available for maximum visual impact.

How weather-resistant are polymetal signs?

Polymetal signs are designed for long-term outdoor exposure with excellent weather resistance. The aluminum composite construction and solid core prevent water infiltration, while UV-resistant inks maintain color vibrancy over time.

How should polymetal signs be stored before installation?

Store polymetal signs in a clean, dry environment away from direct sunlight. Keep signs flat or properly supported to prevent bending, and protect the printed surface from scratches during storage and transport.

Can I review a proof before my polymetal signs are printed?

Yes, we offer order proofs that include a preview of your artwork, complete order details, and billing information. Proof approval is required before production begins, ensuring your signs meet your exact specifications.

What are your production times and when does turnaround begin?

We offer 3 business day standard production and 5 business day saver options. Production begins when file upload is complete and artwork is approved. If proof approval is requested, production starts after you approve the proof.

What material are yard letters and numbers made from?

Our yard letters and numbers are printed on 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast)—a lightweight, durable material with hollow flutes for inserting metal stakes.

Are yard letter and number signs waterproof?

Yes—coroplast is waterproof and suitable for outdoor display. Because the signs are lightweight, we recommend bringing them inside during high winds.

What font styles are available for yard letters and numbers?

Choose from Capucine Basic Italic, Helvetica Neue Lt 85 Heavy, or Urbane Rounded Heavy.

Do you sell pre-made yard letter signs like "Happy Birthday"?

Yes—we offer pre-assembled yard letter sets (including "Happy Birthday") in the same three font styles, with multiple colors and designs.

What size are the yard letters and numbers?

Each letter and number is 18 inches tall. Width varies by character and font style.

How do I order individual yard letters and numbers?

Go to the yard letters or yard numbers product page, choose your font and options, and add the characters you need to your order.

What are yard letters and numbers commonly used for?

They're popular for birthdays, graduations, anniversaries, and holidays, plus business promotions, open houses, school spirit, and sports events.
